match.userMessage:
Handheld camera tracks forward at eye level following Scarlett's confident stride along the wide Bondi Beach promenade. She walks with effortless cool, hair lifting in the salt breeze, then glances back over her shoulder toward camera. Scarlett delivers her line with calm confident posture and a subtle smile while maintaining her natural forward gait. Surfers crest waves in the softly blurred background as warm golden-hour light wraps the scene and light fabric flutters in the ocean breeze.

[SCARLETT, calm confident]: "Made for the water. Wear it everywhere."

Ambient sounds: ocean waves rolling, light salt breeze through palms. soft footsteps on wooden boards, fabric rustle in wind, distant wave crashes.
